'''Salmakk''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Salmakk operated out of the frozen world of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] around prior to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] appeared on Hoth to rescue his friend [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had crashed on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]], Salmakk could not resist trying to collect the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] that [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] had placed on the smuggler's head. Solo avoided capture and trapped the Mon Calamari in a cave-in at his base in a hollowed-out mountain. After spending almost two standard days digging themselves out, Salmakk and his crew packed up operations and left the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].

The remains of his base were taken over by the Rebels, and after [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Kem Monnon/Legends|Kem Monnon]] and the [[Alliance Corps of Engineers/Legends|Alliance Corps of Engineers]] expanded the facilities considerably, Salmakk's former home became [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040325web|text=Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin|int=Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin}}</ref>

In [[5 ABY]], Salmakk and his pirates were hired by [[Trioculus]] to raid storehouses on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="SPIN Declassified">{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-spy-game-spin-declassified|text=The ''Star Wars'' Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|int=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|nolive=1}}</ref>
